disabled_touchpoints.description: List of touchpoint names that are globally disabled. If the current touchpoint matches any entry in this list, the offer screen will not be shown (returns CAN_NOT_OPEN state).

disabled_subtouchpoints.description: List of sub-touchpoint names that are globally disabled. If the current sub-touchpoint matches any entry in this list, the offer screen will not be shown (returns CAN_NOT_OPEN state).

touchpoints.description: List of touchpoint configurations defining which offer screens to show and under what conditions. Each entry is matched against the current touchpoint by its 'name' or 'names'. If no entry matches, a 'default' named entry is used as a fallback.

names.description: Additional touchpoint name aliases for this entry. Allows a single touchpoint configuration to match multiple touchpoint name values in addition to the primary 'name' field.

name.description: The primary name identifier for this touchpoint entry. Used to match against the current touchpoint when deciding which offer configuration to apply. A special value 'default' is used as a fallback when no named touchpoint matches.

info.description: List of offer parameter configurations for this touchpoint. Each entry defines the screens, session tracking, launch conditions, and offer variant for one possible offer to show. Entries are evaluated in order and the first one whose launch logic conditions pass is used.

thank_you_popup.description: Identifier or name of the thank-you popup to display after a successful offer interaction.

launch_logic.description: List of launch logic condition sets. Each entry defines a combination of conditions (session counts, install days, storage, tier, ad availability, etc.) that must all pass for this offer to be eligible. The first matching entry in the list is used.

should_replace_with_ad.description: When true, this offer slot should be replaced with an interstitial ad if one is available for the touchpoint. The offer is only shown if the ad cannot be shown.

should_replace_with_reward_credit.description: When true, this offer slot should be replaced with a rewarded credit ad if one is available for the touchpoint. The offer is only shown if the rewarded credit ad cannot be shown.

install_day_min.description: Minimum number of days since app installation (inclusive) required to show this offer. Use -1 to disable this lower bound.

editor_done_min.description: Minimum number of completed editor sessions (inclusive) required to show this offer. Use -1 to disable this lower bound.

app_session_end.description: Upper bound (exclusive) for the total app session count required to show this offer. Use -1 to disable this upper bound.

editor_done_max.description: Upper bound (exclusive) for the number of completed editor sessions required to show this offer. Use -1 to disable this upper bound.

session_limit_start.description: Minimum offer-specific session count (inclusive) for this touchpoint+screens combination required to show this offer. Use -1 to disable this lower bound.

had_subscription_package.description: List of subscription package identifiers. The offer is shown only if the user has previously had a subscription for at least one of the listed packages. An empty list disables this check.

user_had_subscription.description: When set, restricts the offer to users who have (true) or have never had (false) any subscription. When null/absent, this condition is not applied.

should_replace_with_reward_interstitial.description: When true, this offer slot should be replaced with a rewarded interstitial ad if one is available for the touchpoint. The offer is only shown if the ad cannot be shown.

key_session_start.description: Minimum key session count (inclusive) required to show this offer. Applies only when 'session_key' is non-empty. Use -1 to disable this lower bound.

install_day_max.description: Upper bound (exclusive) for the number of days since app installation required to show this offer. Use -1 to disable this upper bound.

is_ai_credit.description: When set, restricts the offer to users who are (true) or are not (false) in the AI credits flow. When null/absent, this condition is not applied.

offer_screen_touchpoint.description: Touchpoint identifier for the offer screen within launch logic. Takes precedence over 'offer_screen_touch_point' when both are present.

repeat_key_session.description: If set (not -1) and 'session_key' is non-empty, the offer is shown periodically based on the key session count using this interval value. Use -1 to disable.

storage_min_percent.description: Minimum device storage usage percentage (inclusive) required to show this offer. Use -1 to disable this lower bound.

is_store_available.description: When set, the offer is shown only if the Google Play Store availability matches this value (true means Play Store must be an active payment type, false means it must not be). Defaults to true if absent.

key_session_end.description: Upper bound (exclusive) for the key session count required to show this offer. Applies only when 'session_key' is non-empty. Use -1 to disable this upper bound.

repeat_session.description: If set (not -1), the offer is only shown when the total app session count is divisible by this value, enabling periodic repeat display. Use -1 to disable.

offer_screen_touch_point.description: Legacy field specifying the touchpoint identifier for the offer screen within launch logic. Superseded by 'offer_screen_touchpoint'; used as a fallback when the newer field is absent.

restricted_packages.description: List of package/offer pairs that restrict eligibility. The offer is shown only if the user is eligible for a promotional offer for every entry in this list. An empty or absent list disables this check.

package_id.description: The subscription package identifier used to check if the user is eligible for a promotional offer.

offer_id.description: The offer identifier used together with 'package_id' to check if the user is eligible for a specific promotional offer.

current_tier_types.description: List of subscription tier type values that the user must currently have for this offer to be shown. Use 'free' to target non-subscribed users. An empty list disables this check and the offer is shown for any tier.

app_session_start.description: Minimum total app session count (inclusive) required to show this offer. Use -1 to disable this lower bound.

daily_session_limit.description: Maximum number of times this offer can be shown per day for this touchpoint+screens combination. Use -1 to disable the daily limit.

should_replace_with_reward.description: When true, this offer slot should be replaced with a rewarded ad if a rewarded ad is available for the touchpoint. The offer is only shown if the rewarded ad cannot be shown.

skip_offer_during_cooldown.description: When true, this offer is suppressed while the one-day-pass cooldown period is active. When false or absent, the cooldown period does not block the offer.

session_limit_end.description: Upper bound (exclusive) for the offer-specific session count for this touchpoint+screens combination. Use -1 to disable this upper bound.

storage_max_percent.description: Upper bound (exclusive) for the device storage usage percentage required to show this offer. Use -1 to disable this upper bound.

offer_variant.description: Identifier for the offer variant to display. Controls which visual or content variant of the offer screen is shown.

screens.description: List of screen identifiers associated with this offer configuration. Used together with the touchpoint name to build a unique key for tracking session and daily counts.

offer_screen_touchpoint.description: Touchpoint identifier for the offer screen. Takes precedence over 'offer_screen_touch_point' when both are present.

session_key.description: A key used to track and limit how many times this offer has been shown across sessions (key session count). When non-empty, enables key-session-based frequency capping and repeat logic independent of the touchpoint.

is_one_time_offer.description: When true, this offer is a one-time offer that should only be presented to the user once.

offer_screen_touch_point.description: Legacy field specifying the touchpoint identifier for the offer screen. Superseded by 'offer_screen_touchpoint'; used as a fallback when the newer field is absent.
